ModMetaData.name: Intimacy Mood Tuner
ModMetaData.author: Barabel
ModMetaData.description: The mood bonus from intimacy bar is massive — in my playthrough it made the game easy. Tweaking the need decay in options only left pawns with empty bars despite socializing constantly. So I made this mod to let you set each intimacy stage's mood value to whatever feels balanced for your run.
